subcategory: multi-column footer with social links and legal
use_cases: Website footer for SaaS products and startup landing pages
Multi-section footer for business and e-commerce sites
Standard website footer with social media integration
Landing page footer with navigation links and legal compliance
Corporate footer with company, product, and resource links
ai_summary: A comprehensive multi-column footer component featuring a logo, organized link sections (Product, Company, Resources), social media icons with accessibility labels, legal links, and copyright text. Designed as a clean, responsive footer solution for business websites, startup products, and e-commerce platforms with standard Tailwind CSS styling and React-icons integration.
